negative_variants.description: Param Given Gain Select: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Param Given Gain Select: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Param Given Gain Select: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Param Given Gain Select: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Param Given Gain Select: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
